name: Creamy Smooth Peanut Butter Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and peanut butter together until smooth.
2. Beat in the granulated sugar, blending well.
3. Add the eggs, vanilla extract, salt, baking soda, and flour to the mixture.
4. Mix until all ingredients are fully incorporated.
5. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto a greased cookie sheet.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 to 12 minutes.
Yield: About 5 dozen cookies
